positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a celestial forest meeting a cosmic dreamscape. The scene features oversized, bioluminescent flora resembling abstract jellyfish and glowing mushrooms, intertwined with the silhouette of a majestic, mythical winged creature (like a griffin or phoenix) taking flight against a nebula background. The style must be hyper-detailed, vaporwave meets Art Nouveau, utilizing thick, clean outlines and strong, saturated contrast. Color palette focuses on deep indigo, electric cyan, neon magenta, and touches of metallic gold for highlights. Composition is centered and balanced, designed for a repeating textile pattern or a large central apparel print. Emphasize clean edges, dramatic lighting, and high visual contrast. Vector-style clean lines, highly stylized, graphic novel quality.
negative: blurry, amateur drawing, grainy, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, logo, artifact, extra limbs, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, cropped, monochrome, realistic photo, bokeh
